_claim: L2 — Photon speed from small rest mass: v = c_causality * sqrt(1 - (m_γ*c^2/E)^2)
_convention: Per theory/speed-of-causality-principle.md: c is the causality limit; photons have nonzero rest mass and travel at v < c strictly. Do NOT write v_photon = c anywhere.

c_causality.source: SI definition — speed of causality (exact). NOT to be called 'speed of light'.

m_gamma_GCM.source: gcm_v2.md §L-family (provisional; placeholder consistent with L1 bound)

eV_per_kg.source: CODATA 2018 (derived from 1 eV = 1.602176634e-19 J and c_causality)

FRB_photon_mass_bound_eVc2.source: Wang et al. 2023 JCAP — FRB dispersion bound on photon mass

Delta_v_from_brief.source: session brief — approximation using 2-sig-fig inputs; precise computation yields ~4.72e-29
